review_title: Easy video production tech that keeps getting better
description: Overall, it's one of my favorite tools to work with. Great experience.
author: David B.
pros: It's a really easy-to-use, intuitive video creator that keeps getting better. They're always adding new features, and they deliver a ton of value.
cons: They are iterating really quickly, so that means occasionally there's a bug, or there is something that's not intuitive. If I ever have a question though, their team is very responsive, and they love getting feedback about how to make it better.

review_title: I wish itr worked better. To many glitches
description: Very dissapointed in the text blocks and media add ons. Trying to get them timed to stay on the page. Your timers were very dificult to work with. The voices were great. The music would stay on the length settings. When I downloaded the videos many things didn't stay as origianlly saved.
author: Bill M.
pros: your program has great potential but is lacking on many issues. I love the concept and I will stil try to utilize it a couple more times. The last two videos I tried to produce came back with "Something Went Wrong" and ir didn't save anything. I had to go start all over again only for it to give me the same responce.
cons: the least thing I like is your lack of live customer service. and the service you do provide just runs you in circles

description: Teaming up with Project Gutenberg, i set out to build out content with existing Open Domain Work. I have over 3 years experience with PlotagonStory where i adapted Character Scripting for Augie. Season 1 "AroundTheWorldin80Days" Season 2 "InTheBeginning" this AudioDrama is heard worldwide but tagged in the description to watch the video on Substack | YouTube. With just myself as the creator, i assigned a voice to each character and have a cheatsheet to remind whom is whom. Then in playback alongside music from Uppbeat.io the tone is set. My narrator Catherine reads the Bible to you but each name of the scriptures comes to life. Although i skipped sound efx the experience is still amazing.
author: John H.
pros: Augie will streamline the experience bridging your audience to the emotion of the story. Augie can auto build imagery based on text provided or you can edit the scene and search your own.
cons: Due to the nature of Narrative AI be cautious to not automatically accept the results before publishing your work. Remember the English language has multiple meanings for a single word.Therefore when you search as example "God" you will be shown multiple gods. Here is where things can go south. It's for your own good, get in the habit of previewing each scene listen to the audio, music. Watch for clues to make sure the image or video matches if not adjust.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I love it sonce i just recently started my youtube channel and in less than 5 minutes i create awesome videos with background music, captions and voice over.

description: Overall, I am extremely happy and satisfied with the results from Augie. If you're like me, and just hate making videos for work, social media and presentations, then Augie is the best app I have found...by FAR.

review_title: Augie: A Beacon of Resilience and Joy
author: Nabil A.
pros: Augie's most endearing quality was his unwavering optimism and resilience in the face of adversity. Despite the challenges he encountered due to his facial differences, Augie approached life with a positive attitude, kindness, and a sense of humor. His ability to find joy in everyday moments and his capacity to inspire others to see beyond appearances were truly remarkable.
cons: It's difficult to pinpoint anything inherently negative about Augie himself. However, one might lament the societal prejudices and misunderstandings he had to face simply because of his appearance. If anything, it's a reflection of the challenges individuals with physical differences encounter in a world often fixated on superficial beauty standards.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very happy, very easy to learn and use. If you are a new user looking to start, Augie is a great program that allows you to grow into a much better video generator
